headline: Live Nation exec brags about ‘robbing fans blind’ on fees — then got promoted. Here’s what you’re really paying for
summary: Leaked Slack messages reveal potentially deceitful business practices — and the DOJ just let Live Nation keep Ticketmaster, setting its antitrust suit.
